untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Bollinger Band width percentile comparison (not available—only bb_bandwidth in decimal scale provided), (2) 'sustain_bars_minimum' consecutive bars directional check (no multi-bar lookback operators available), (3) impulse move magnitude in standard deviations of 'recent price range' (no rolling stddev of range available—only ATR and hvol exist), (4) volume confirmation as current_vol > Nx MA(vol,M) (vol_ratio_20 exists but parametrization differs). Used ADX as equilibrium proxy and returns for impulse detection, but original signal specificity cannot be fully captured.
translation_notes: Interpreted equilibrium exit as ADX < 20 (trending threshold). Impulse entry approximated as price returns exceeding ±2% (0.02 decimal) with volume > vol_ratio_20. Regime targeting set to TRENDING states. Original signal's precise threshold parametrization ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders) and Bollinger Band width percentile logic could not be expressed with available indicators.
